parameters.query:
SELECT id, email, created_at 
FROM users 
WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER($1)
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO users (
  email,
  full_name,
  role,
  department,
  phone,
  start_date,
  password_hash,
  password_reset_required,
  status,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, true, 'active', NOW()
)
RETURNING id, email, created_at

options.queryReplacement: =$1 = {{ $('Normalize Email & Name').item.json.email }}, $2 = {{ $('Normalize Email & Name').item.json.full_name }}, $3 = {{ $('Map Roles to Enum').item.json.role }}, $4 = {{ $('Assign Department Default').item.json.department }}, $5 = {{ $('Normalize Phone Number').item.json.phone }}, $6 = {{ $('Normalize Date').item.json.start_date }}, $7 = {{ $json.temp_password }}

parameters.subject: Welcome to Company! Here's How to Get Started
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $('Normalize Email & Name').item.json.full_name }},

Your account has been created and is ready to use.

📧 Email: {{ $json.tracking.successful_users[0].email }}
🔑 Temporary Password: {{ $('Generate Temp Password').item.json.temp_password }}
🔗 Login: https://app.company.com/login

Next Steps:
1. Log in with your temporary password
2. You'll be prompted to change it
3. Review your onboarding checklist (attached)
4. Join our Slack workspace

Welcome aboard!
